Metadata.title: MORE Apartments
Metadata.description: Premium vacation properties and hotel-style stays. Browse our listings and book your next getaway.

Home.welcomeTitle: Welcome to MORE Guest Apartments in Be'er Sheva
introParagraphs: We offer a variety of renovated, furnished, and fully equipped apartments located near Soroka Medical Center, Ben-Gurion University, and Writers' Park.
The apartments are available for nightly and short-term rental.

In every apartment you can enjoy free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV with Netflix, air conditioning in every room, a bedroom with a spacious bed, a private shower and toilet, and a kitchenette with facilities for preparing hot drinks.
All apartments include free parking on a space-available basis.
In some apartments you will enjoy a spacious and pleasant balcony or a garden with grass and a coffee corner.
Check-in is self-service using a key waiting for you in a lockbox.
After booking, you will receive detailed instructions including the lockbox code.
hostingPolicyItems: Check-out by 13:00 with prior coordination and an additional fee of ₪100
Check-out after 13:00 will be charged as an additional night
Saturday night check-out based on space availability, or by prior arrangement with an additional charge of half the nightly rate
Smoking is strictly prohibited in the apartments, except in designated areas
No additional guests beyond the booked number
No pets if the booking was made through external booking platforms
cancellationPolicyItems: Cancellation is permitted up to 7 days before arrival at no charge
Cancellations less than 7 days before arrival will be charged in full
If the booking was made less than 7 days before arrival, the guest may cancel within 24 hours at no charge; after that, full payment applies
Home.trustLine: Trusted hospitality for short and extended stays

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Hospitality built on care and quality
About.introduction: We are a local hospitality team dedicated to offering exceptional stays in beautifully maintained properties.
About.storyContent: What started as a single apartment has grown into a curated collection of properties for travelers who value comfort, location, and personal service. We believe every guest deserves a warm welcome and a space that feels truly theirs.
About.approachContent: From check-in to check-out, we focus on clear communication, spotless spaces, and thoughtful details. Every property is inspected and prepared with the same standards we would expect for our own guests.
About.credentialsContent: Prime locations, transparent pricing, flexible stays, and responsive support via WhatsApp. We combine hotel-level service with the freedom and privacy of your own apartment.
About.ctaBody: Tell us your dates and preferences — we will help you find the right property.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.body: Have a question before you book? Reach out — we are happy to help.
Contact.trustLine: We typically respond within a few hours

BookNow.title: Book Now
BookNow.body: Fill out the form below with your details and preferred property. We will confirm availability on WhatsApp.

WhatsAppForm.heading: Booking inquiry via WhatsApp
WhatsAppForm.servicePlaceholder: e.g. Sea View Suite, 12–15 June, 2 guests
WhatsAppForm.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Israeli phone number (e.g. 0512345678)
